title: How I Work
subtitle: A structured and transparent approach to building long-term systems.

steps.title: Understanding the Business
steps.description: Start by deeply understanding your business model, goals, and challenges before writing any code.

steps.title: System & Architecture Design
steps.description: Design a scalable and maintainable system architecture tailored to your needs.

steps.title: Iterative Development
steps.description: Build the system in structured iterations, ensuring continuous progress and clarity.

steps.title: Testing & Refinement
steps.description: Validate functionality, refine the system, and ensure stability before moving forward.

steps.title: Deployment & Support
steps.description: Deploy the system and provide support to ensure smooth operation and future growth.
